description_long: This is a tall, freestanding vertical banner with a rectangular display area supported by a slim metal frame and two flat, weighted bases for stability. The front face features Japanese text in black on a white background, likely indicating an event or announcement, with the text running vertically. The frame appears to be made of metal, providing rigidity and durability, while the banner material itself is likely a synthetic fabric or vinyl for clear printing and weather resistance. The rear side is plain and unmarked, showing only the structural frame and support legs. The side views reveal the thinness of the banner and the minimal profile of the supporting structure. This type of banner is commonly used for public events, ceremonies, or informational displays in urban environments.
description: A tall, freestanding vertical banner with Japanese text on a white background, supported by a slim metal frame and weighted bases.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full banner face with Japanese text and the supporting frame and bases.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the banner and the narrow supporting structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the banner and the metal frame with support legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and support structure.
